intro: The residential and transportation sectors were primary targets in a recent wave of IoT threats, which also impacted individuals, logistics, and telecommunications. Analysis of nine reports from late April 2026 reveals a severity mix of two critical, four high, and three medium incidents. The Mirai threat actor was active, exploiting vulnerabilities including CVE-2025-29635, CVE-2026-22898, and CVE-2026-4682, all with a CVSS score of 8.8. Additional leveraged flaws were CVE-2026-5057 (7.5) and CVE-2024-3721 (6.3).
